Robotics Case

Inspection Fixture for a Robotics Automation Line

line inspection / positioning fixture / repeated measurement

IndustriesRobotics
Part Functionline inspection / positioning fixture / repeated measurement
Manufacturing Capabilitiesfixture machining, assembly checking, dimensional inspection and documentation

Project Scenario

The automation line fixture required reliable positioning and repeated measurement support for production-line inspection.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The fixture improved inspection consistency and provided a reference for line-side quality checks.
